display.purpose: Welcome 与 skills 页主标题

label.purpose: 侧栏分区标题，uppercase 限用

motion.name: ease-ui
motion.purpose: 按钮、菜单 hover 默认 0.2s

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: 发送消息、确认操作等主 CTA
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { padding: 10px 18px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.24); background: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.88); color: #e2e8f0; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s ease, background 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); background: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.95); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #60a5fa; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.6; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; }

components.name: Sidebar Menu Item
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; width: 100%; padding: 12px 14px; min-height: 46px; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.72); color: #dbeafe; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; border: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.08); cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s ease, background 0.2s ease; } .ds-nav-item:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-nav-item.is-active { background: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.28); border-color: rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.25); } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #60a5fa; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Composer Shell
components.css: .ds-composer { display: grid; gap: 14px; padding: 16px 18px 14px; border-radius: 26px; background: rgba(2, 6, 23, 0.8); border: 1px solid rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.22); box-shadow: 0 24px 80px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.22); } .ds-composer__input { width: 100%; resize: none; border: 0; outline: 0; color: #e2e8f0; background: transparent; min-height: 78px; font-size: 0.98rem; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-composer__input::placeholder { color: #94a3b8; } .ds-composer__toolbar { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; }

components.name: Assistant Bubble
components.html: 这是助手回复示例。
components.css: .ds-bubble { width: fit-content; max-width: min(760px, 100%); padding: 16px 18px; border-radius: 22px; border: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.14); color: #e2e8f0; } .ds-bubble--assistant { background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.86); border-top-left-radius: 8px; } .ds-bubble__text { margin: 0; white-space: pre-wrap; word-break: break-word; font-size: 0.98rem; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Mode Badge
components.description: 历史列表中的会话模式标识
components.css: .ds-mode-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-width: 24px; height: 18px; padding: 0 4px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.02em; } .ds-mode-badge--agent { color: #93c5fd; background: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.14); border: 1px solid rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.2); } .ds-mode-badge--knowledge { color: #86efac; background: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.14); border: 1px solid rgba(74, 222, 128, 0.2); }

narrative.overview: Nebula Desk 面向长时间 AI 工作：深色星云画布默认，冷色 accent 小面积使用，分层透明与细边框传达深度。拒绝 SaaS 营销套路与消费级 IM 风格。
keyCharacteristics: 280px 固定侧栏 + fluid 主区
默认 dark canvas；dzj / lv 浅色主题
模式 badge 颜色+文字双重编码
dos: Do 保持 sidebar + main 壳层一致
Do 用模式 badge 双重表达会话类型
Do 限制 display clamp max ≤ 2.8rem
Do 新 surface 复用既有 token
Do 主题切换通过 [data-theme] 覆盖
donts: Don't 做成通用 SaaS 仪表盘 cliché
Don't 模仿消费级 IM 气泡风格
Don't 默认 glassmorphism 堆叠
Don't 用 washed-out gray 正文
Don't 使用 z-index 魔法数 9999
